2026-02-26.text:
- was very tired when I woke up, only managed to get out of bed around noon

- made good progress on the "Today" page and journals

- I actually cooked dinner this time! And get there are no leftovers somehow ;(

- made good progress on Celeste :3

- ended up staying up very late 3:

2026-02-27.text:
- woke up very late (tho I did need the sleep)

- took a shower in the morning (early afternoon), this was nice

- my nipples feel very sensitive, and this morning my chest started to feel sore. This means things are starting to grow! :3

- made lots of progress on tracker app, but got to bed very late again D:

2026-02-28.text:
- Woke up at a decent time, but eepy cause of staying up late last night

- went shopping with mom, we got some bras :3 However, I was "forced" (heavily implied I should) use the mens changing room when trying them. I definitely didn't pass :(

- went thrifting, got a very nice scale (which will be useful for tracking my weight). I also found a ton of really good clothes, 3 skirts (one of which is professional oriented) and a bunch of cute tops :3

2026-03-01.text:
- Woke up at a nice time, had brunch with family, feeling good this morning

- Went to band practice, told several people my preferred name, and was accepted :3 This makes me very happy
